title: Spawn Protection
description: SpawnProtect is a lightweight Paper plugin that lets you easily create, manage, and protect custom spawn regions using WorldEdit selections and intuitive commands. Perfect for any server that needs flexible spawn protection and simple administration.
body:
SpawnProtect is a robust, lightweight region management solution for Paper servers, built to integrate seamlessly with WorldEdit. With SpawnProtect, server administrators can create, manage, and protect custom spawn zones directly from in-game commands.

Main features:

- Define spawn regions using WorldEdit selections.
- Name, list, and remove spawn zones as needed.
- Set custom spawn radii (buffer areas).
- Instantly teleport to any registered spawn zone.
- View detailed info about each spawn (world, boundaries, radius).
- YAML-based persistent storage for all spawns.
- Smart tab completion for easy command usage.

Usage:
Select an area with WorldEdit (//pos1, //pos2), then run /spawn set <name>. Customize buffer radii with /spawn radius <name> <value>. Use /spawn tp <name> to quickly teleport to any registered spawn zone.

Why SpawnProtect?

- Simple, fast, and reliable.
- Full WorldEdit compatibility (supports all recent versions, including 7.3+).
- Easy YAML import/export for backups and migration.
- No unnecessary overhead—focused only on spawn region protection and management.

Great for:

- Survival and creative servers needing custom spawn protection.
- Community servers with multiple spawn zones or hubs.
- Admins who want fast and intuitive spawn control via commands.

Requirements:
- PaperMC (Minecraft 1.20.1 or newer)
- WorldEdit (version 7.2+ recommended)

Commands:
- /spawn set <name> — Create spawn region from your WorldEdit selection
- /spawn list — List all spawn regions
- /spawn remove <name> — Remove a spawn region
- /spawn info <name> — Show info about a spawn region
- /spawn radius <name> <value> — Set buffer radius for a region
- /spawn tp <name> — Teleport to spawn region

Default permissions:
All commands are permission-based for secure, flexible use.

SpawnProtect: The fast, reliable way to manage and protect your spawn regions!
